title: Commit the KCD2 Dice Solver app and add run.sh
objective: Bring the previously-untracked kcd2_dice_solver Vite/React/TypeScript app under git version control, and add a run.sh that installs its dependencies and starts its dev server with a single command.
acceptance_criteria: kcd2_dice_solver/ source, tests, and config files are tracked in git (node_modules/dist/coverage remain ignored)
run.sh ensures Node >=22 and pnpm are available, runs `pnpm install`, then starts `pnpm dev`
run.sh is executable, shellcheck-clean, and verified to serve HTTP 200 on http://localhost:5174
pre-commit passes on all staged files
out_of_scope: No changes to the solver's game logic, scoring, or UI behavior
No CI workflow added for this app
verifier: pre-commit run --files <staged files>; manual run of ./run.sh with curl against http://localhost:5174
